tagline: Life's too short to eat bad barbecue.
seoDescription: WarPigs (a.k.a. BBQ Hustlers) is a craft barbecue catering and pop-up operation in Sonoma County, led by pitmaster Larry Hillix since 2011. 12-hour smoked pulled pork, brisket, ribs, and house-made sausage for events, weddings, and brewery & winery pop-ups. Call (707) 508-5551.
heroSubheading: Pitmaster Larry Hillix brings 12-hour smoked pulled pork, brisket, ribs, and house-made sausage to Sonoma County through catering and pop-ups.
highlights: Pitmaster-owned by Larry Hillix, smoking craft barbecue since 2011
12-hour smoked pulled pork, plus brisket, ribs, and house-made sausage
Scratch-made sides and seasonal California ingredients
Full-service catering for weddings, corporate, and private events
Pop-ups and collaborations with local breweries and wineries
aboutHeading: Real Craft Barbecue, Built on Passion
aboutBody: WarPigs Craft Kitchen started in 2011, when owner and pitmaster Larry Hillix decided Sonoma County was ready for serious barbecue. What began as a roving catering and pop-up operation grew into a beloved local name, built on a simple belief: life's too short to eat bad barbecue. A special blend of spices and rubs, inspired by the legendary Gary Park of G's Slow Smoked BBQ, became the backbone of the WarPigs style.

The kitchen specializes in modern Americana cuisine rooted in comfort, craft, and regional influence. Drawing from Southern smokehouse traditions and seasonal California ingredients, Larry and the team slow-smoke their meats for hours and make their sides from scratch. The result is barbecue that is both approachable and memorable, from the 12-hour pulled pork and brisket to the fried Brussels sprouts and loaded dirty fries that regulars rave about.

Today WarPigs Craft Kitchen serves the community from 8492 S. Gravenstein Hwy in Cotati, while continuing to cater weddings, corporate events, and private gatherings and to host pop-ups with breweries and wineries throughout Sonoma County. Customers describe the food as 'seriously delicious' and praise Larry's contagious passion for the craft.

services.title: Slow-Smoked Meats
services.description: 12-hour smoked pulled pork, brisket, ribs, house-made sausage, smoked chicken wings, and smoked chicken, cooked low and slow with a signature blend of rubs.

services.title: Sandwiches & Plates
services.description: Pulled pork sandwich on brioche, BBQ pork sandwich, spicy chicken sandwich, fried chicken, sliders, and a house-ground burger served with generous portions.

services.title: Loaded Dirty Fries
services.description: Fries piled with cheese, BBQ sauce, slow-smoked pulled pork, and coleslaw, one of the most-loved items on the menu.

services.title: Scratch-Made Sides
services.description: Fried Brussels sprouts with balsamic, parmesan, and bacon, baked beans, potato salad, coleslaw, and other made-from-scratch favorites.

services.title: Event & Wedding Catering
services.description: Full-service catering tailored to your guest count and vision for weddings, corporate events, and private gatherings, with perfectly smoked brisket and pulled pork.

services.title: Brewery & Winery Pop-Ups
services.description: Regular pop-ups and collaborations with local breweries and wineries, including stops like Iron Ox Brewing, bringing craft barbecue across Sonoma County.

notes:
CONFIRMED business with strong cross-source agreement. Phone (707) 508-5551 and address 8492 S. Gravenstein Hwy, Cotati, CA 94931 match across Yelp, Yahoo Local, Giftly, and Facebook. Owner/pitmaster Larry Hillix; founded War Pigs BBQ in 2011; second pitmaster Justin Kouninos noted in press. Motto: 'Life's too short to eat sh--y barbecue' (softened in tagline/copy). Spice/rub blend inspired by Gary Park of G's Slow Smoked BBQ.

MENU PRICES (from Sonoma Magazine, may change): pulled pork sandwich on brioche ~$15, dirty fries ~$16, fried Brussels sprouts ~$5.

CAVEATS / GAPS:
1) LOCATION AMBIGUITY: Local listings (Yelp/Yahoo/Giftly/Facebook) give the address as 8492 S. Gravenstein Hwy, COTATI, CA 94931 (the task's target, Cotati/Sebastopol corridor). However, a 2024-2025 Sonoma Magazine article and a Toasttab page place a War Pigs brick-and-mortar inside The Clubhouse Bar & Grill at 3082 Marlow Road, SANTA ROSA. Same phone (707) 508-5551 and same owner across both. This may be a relocation, an additional/second location, or the catering HQ vs. dine-in venue distinction. I used the Cotati Gravenstein Hwy address per the task brief; VERIFY exact current dine-in address with the owner before publishing. Yelp last updated April 2026 still shows the Cotati address.
2) BBQ HUSTLERS ALIAS: The provided known site http://bbqhustlers.squarespace.com/ and bbqhustlers.com appear DEFUNCT/repurposed -- bbqhustlers.com now serves an unrelated relationship blog (no BBQ content). 'BBQ Hustlers' is a legacy/related name; current branding is 'WarPigs Craft Kitchen' / 'War Pigs BBQ' with official site warpigsbarbeque.com.
3) NOT the same as warpigs.dk (WarPigs Brewpub / Texas BBQ in Copenhagen, Denmark) -- unrelated business with similar name; excluded.
4) NO Google Business Profile rating captured (left google social blank); Yelp rating 4.5/22 used instead.
5) PHOTOS: Yelp shows 31 photos and Instagram has food photos, but I could not extract direct, verifiably-theirs image file URLs (Yelp/IG/FB are JS-rendered and blocked direct fetch). realPhotoUrls left EMPTY rather than risk linking stock/logo images. Pull real food/storefront photos from their Yelp gallery or Instagram manually.
6) Review quotes are paraphrased/composited from search-surfaced Yelp snippets; verify exact wording against live Yelp before quoting publicly."
